Package com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews

package com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation
     
  • Class
    Description
    AlbumCardListCell
    A ListCell that renders an Album as a horizontal card row, showing a 60px album art thumbnail on the left and the album title and metadata (song count and release year) stacked on the right.
    AlbumListCell
    A lightweight ListCell that renders an Album as a compact two-line row showing the album title and a summary of its song count and release year.
    AlbumSongCell
    A ListCell used inside the album detail view to display a single Song as a tabular row containing the track number, title, play count, date first listened, and a context-menu trigger button.
    AlbumViewBuilder
    Builds the full album detail view displayed when a user selects an album.
    AlphabetBar
    A vertical A-Z (plus #) alphabet bar that sits on the right edge of a list view.
    ArtistViewBuilder
    Builds the artist list view and the artist detail view for the library's Artists screen.
    FavouritesViewBuilder
    Builds the Favourites screen, displaying songs the current user has marked as favourites sorted by the date they were added.
    LibraryHandler
    A lightweight context record that bundles the core services and callbacks required by the library view layer.
    SongCell
    A ListCell that renders a Song as a horizontal row containing an optional 40px album-art thumbnail, the song title, the primary artist name, and an optional context-menu trigger button.
    SongEditDialog
    A modal dialog that allows the user to edit the metadata of a Song.
    SongHandler
    Handles song-level user interactions by presenting a ContextMenu anchored to the triggering UI element.
    SongViewBuilder
    Builds reusable song and album display components, list views, card grids, and album grids, used in the library.
